summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Senteur L perfume e-commerce platform. Fixed critical React SelectItem issue and verified all major functionality works correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API - All 34 tests passed (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, new products, promotions, and brands
Shop page displays products with working filters (gender, brand, category, price range)
Product detail page shows product info with functional add to cart
Cart functionality: add items, update quantity, view total
Checkout page with form validation and Stripe integration
Admin dashboard shows correct stats and navigation
All navigation between pages works smoothly
Responsive design and UI components render properly
